name: getFirstCANdbFilename
title: getFirstCANdbFilename
syntax: dword getFirstCANdbFilename( char buffer[], dword size);
description: Finds out the file name of the first assigned database.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the database file name is written.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in Byte.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
